
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Rooster|kanji=丁酉|romaji=hinoto tori|onyomi=teiyū|p=dīyǒu|w=ting-yu|mi=tʰiŋ⁵³ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=deng1 jau5|j=deng1 jau5|ci=tɛŋ jɐu|mc=tæŋ jɨu|oc-bs=tæŋ jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Fire Rooster also known as 丁酉''' (hinototori, teika no tori, teiyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 34th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingshen|ja|1=Yang Fire Monkey|2=ja|丙申|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingshen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wuxu|ja|1=Yang Earth Dog|2=ja|戊戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|lt=Hinoto (丁)|2=ja|3=丁|4=zh|5=丁|1=Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (丁)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|lt=Fire (火)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (火)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (火)|2=uk|3=Вогонь (У-сін)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=Hỏa (Ngũ hành)|10=ar|11=النار (وو شينغ)|lt=Fire (火)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|qid=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Fire overcomes Metal).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Rooster (丁酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dīngyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: teiyū
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongyu (정유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Đinh Dậu

==Years of Yin Fire Rooster==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 37 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Rooster (丁酉)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 37|en|AD 37|qid=Q23456|lt=37 AD|1=AD 37}}
* {{ill|AD 97|en|AD 97|qid=Q30960|lt=97 AD|1=AD 97}}
* {{ill|157|en|157|qid=Q30930|lt=157 AD|1=157}}
* {{ill|217|en|217|qid=Q32030|lt=217 AD|1=217}}
* {{ill|277|en|277|qid=Q32035|lt=277 AD|1=277}}
* {{ill|337|en|337|qid=Q30305|lt=337 AD|1=337}}
* {{ill|397|en|397|qid=Q48141|lt=397 AD|1=397}}
* {{ill|457|en|457|qid=Q30909|lt=457 AD|1=457}}
* {{ill|517|en|517|qid=Q49187|lt=517 AD|1=517}}
* {{ill|577|en|577|qid=Q32517|lt=577 AD|1=577}}
* {{ill|637|en|637|qid=Q33294|lt=637 AD|1=637}}
* {{ill|697|en|697|qid=Q23489|lt=697 AD|1=697}}
* {{ill|AD 757|en|AD 757|qid=Q31135|lt=757 AD|1=AD 757}}
* {{ill|817|en|817|qid=Q25030|lt=817 AD|1=817}}
* {{ill|877|en|877|qid=Q23905|lt=877 AD|1=877}}
* {{ill|937|en|937|qid=Q23720|lt=937 AD|1=937}}
* {{ill|997|en|997|qid=Q23571|lt=997 AD|1=997}}
|
* {{ill|1057|en|1057|qid=Q19377|lt=1057 AD|1=1057}}
* {{ill|1117|en|1117|qid=Q19538|lt=1117 AD|1=1117}}
* {{ill|1177|en|1177|qid=Q19694|lt=1177 AD|1=1177}}
* {{ill|1237|en|1237|qid=Q5430|lt=1237 AD|1=1237}}
* {{ill|1297|en|1297|qid=Q5562|lt=1297 AD|1=1297}}
* {{ill|1357|en|1357|qid=Q6135|lt=1357 AD|1=1357}}
* {{ill|1417|en|1417|qid=Q6193|lt=1417 AD|1=1417}}
* {{ill|1477|en|1477|qid=Q6614|lt=1477 AD|1=1477}}
* {{ill|1537|en|1537|qid=Q6461|lt=1537 AD|1=1537}}
* {{ill|1597|en|1597|qid=Q6790|lt=1597 AD|1=1597}}
* {{ill|1657|en|1657|qid=Q6987|lt=1657 AD|1=1657}}
* {{ill|1717|en|1717|qid=Q6895|lt=1717 AD|1=1717}}
* {{ill|1777|en|1777|qid=Q7709|lt=1777 AD|1=1777}}
* {{ill|1837|en|1837|qid=Q7608|lt=1837 AD|1=1837}}
* {{ill|1897|en|1897|qid=Q7847|lt=1897 AD|1=1897}}
* {{ill|1957|en|1957|qid=Q5311|lt=1957 AD|1=1957}}
|
* {{ill|2017|en|2017|qid=Q25290|lt=2017 AD|1=2017}}
* {{ill|2077 AD|ja|2077年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2077|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2077 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2137 AD|ja|2137年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2137|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2137 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2197 AD|ja|2197年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2197|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2197 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2257 AD|ja|2257年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2257|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2257 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2317 AD|ja|2317年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2317|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2317 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2377 AD|ja|2377年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2377|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2377 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2437 AD|ja|2437年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2437|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2437 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2497 AD|ja|2497年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2497|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2497 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2557 AD|ja|2557年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2557|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2557 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2617 AD|ja|2617年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2617|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2617 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2677 AD|ja|2677年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2677|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2677 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2737 AD|ja|2737年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2737|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2737 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2797 AD|ja|2797年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2797|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2797 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2857 AD|ja|2857年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2857|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2857 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2917 AD|ja|2917年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2917|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2917 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2977 AD|ja|2977年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2977|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2977 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 2 (1597 AD), the campaign known as the {{ill|Keichō Campaign|ja|文禄・慶長の役#慶長の役|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Campaign|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keichō Campaign|1=Imjin War|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q576338}} took place, which in Korea is referred to as the "Teiyuu Rebellion."
* In {{ill|Tenmon|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenmon|qq=}} 6 (1537 AD), the temple founded in Tsushima by {{ill|Kagetetsu Gensu|ja|景轍玄蘇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kagetetsu Gensu|1=Keitetsu Genso|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10855181}} was named "Itou" (酊) by combining the characters of Teiyuu.

==Months of Yin Fire Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|qid=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|qid=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|qid=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
=== 選日 ===
The day of {{ill|Teiyuu|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teiyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11442153}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Rooster|qq=ja|丁酉|version=84123810|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q201551|af|Vuurhaan (astrologie)|cdo|Dĭng-iū|de|Feuer-Hahn|fr|Coq de feu|hak|Tên-yû|ja|丁酉|ko|정유 (간지)|nds|Füür-Hahn|vi|Đinh Dậu|za|Dingyoux|zh-min-nan|Teng-iú|zh-yue|丁酉|zh|丁酉|zh-min-nan|Īt-chú|zh-yue|乙丑|cdo|Ék-cṳ̄de|nds|Metall-Büffelvi|de|Yin Fire Rooster|af|Metaalos (astrologie)|de|Metall-Büffelen|en|Metal Ox|fr|Buffle de métalboishak|it|Yit-chṳ́id|ko|을축|vi|Ất Sửu|za|Yitceij|zh|乙丑|ar|Yin Fire Rooster}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
